name: writing-assistant
description: Real-time writing companion. Suggest related notes, check consistency, generate summaries, and improve writing quality.
author: Claude (Claudian)
examples: /writing-assistant enhance - 增强当前笔记的写作质量
/writing-assistant summarize - 生成当前笔记的摘要
/writing-assistant check-consistency - 检查与其他笔记的一致性
/writing-assistant suggest-structure - 建议笔记结构优化
